title: Fartilizer
description: A Minecraft Forge mod adding "fartilizing" gas to minecraft A.K.A. sneaky crop growth!
body:
**Fartilizer** is a _Forge_ mod that allows the player to release "fartilizing" gas when they sneak around! It primarily came about as I could not find a mod that achieved quite what I wanted in terms of not having to spam/mash the sneak button to grow crops, trees, and sugarcane(I hate twerking to grow in skyblock-esque packs). Thus, I created this mod and decided it would be fun to add a few particle and sound effects to the idea to go with the "fartilizing" theme!

Now available on 1.19.2 and 1.20.1!

[Join The Discord!](https://discord.com/invite/UZPumm8s7r)
